infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NoLSAF Driver uses your location while a trip is active so the passenger and dispatch can see your progress.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: NoLSAF Driver shares your location during an active trip, even in the background, so the passenger and dispatch can keep seeing your progress.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: NoLSAF Driver uses your location while a trip is active so the passenger and dispatch can see your progress.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: NoLSAF Driver shares your location during an active trip, even in the background, so the passenger and dispatch can keep seeing your progress.
